title: chrysosplenium serreanum
intro: Chrysosplenium serreanum, also known as the Golden Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium serreanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
